name: Chinese Chicken-Noodle Salad #2
recipeIngredient: 1 cup (1/2-inch) diagonally sliced fresh snow peas
2 cups Shredded cooked chicken breast -- approximately 3/4 pound
1 medium Cucumber, peeled, halved lengthwise and sliced -- about 3/4 cup
recipeInstructions:
1. Break pasta into 5-inch pieces. Cook in boiling water for 2 minutes. Add snow peas and cook an additional minute.
2. Drain and rinse under cold, running water; drain well.
3. Combine the pasta mixture, chicken, and next three ingredients in a bowl; set aside.
4. In a separate bowl, combine teriyaki sauce and the remaining five ingredients; stir well.
5. Pour the dressing over the pasta mixture and toss well. Serve at room temperature or chilled.
Yield: 4 servings (1-1/2 cups each)
